crypto_key_id.description: The crypto key ID, in the form {project_id}/{location_name}/{key_ring_name}/{crypto_key_name} or {location_name}/{key_ring_name}/{crypto_key_name}. In the second form, the provider's project setting will be used as a fallback.

members.description: Identities that will be granted the privilege in role.

role.description: The role that should be applied. Note that custom roles must be of the format [projects|organizations]/{parent-name}/roles/{role-name}.

condition.type: list(object({expression: string, title: string, description: string}))
condition.description: An IAM Condition for a given binding.
